text: Adoption is governed by requirement, not information: removing friction and adding a primer moved voluntary use only 6->11%, while forcing lifted it to 100% with 100% PNG read-back - and the agent never self-discovers the Read-the-PNG step. But forced visualization is confirmatory, not corrective: solve rates are unchanged and the model reports the picture did not change its approach. Visualization fires only when required, and even then does no solving work on true-claim problems.
